findings.issue: Required Skills path still uses tilde-relative notation '~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md'. On Windows, tilde paths do not expand reliably. Tasks 5, 7, 9 in this batch use absolute Windows paths.
Edge cases section still contains the instruction to use a TODO() marker: 'use a temporary TODO("Task 8 reworks ChatScreen signature")'. This is a TODO marker per validation checklist.
findings.fix: Rephrase without the TODO marker: 'If ChatScreen signature is not yet compatible, use a placeholder Text composable in the chat route lambda stubs until Task 8 updates the signature.'

findings.issue: AC item states 'Old route chat/{modelName} (string-based, Uri-encoded) is removed from the NavHost', but the task body (Details / SanctumApp.kt section) explicitly instructs to keep it as a tombstone with a redirect body. The AC contradicts the implementation plan — the route is retained, not removed.
findings.fix: Align the AC with the actual plan: change to 'Old route chat/{modelName} is replaced with a tombstone (redirect to home) pending removal in Task 8' or update the AC to say 'the old route no longer handles real navigation (redirected to home)'.

findings.issue: Project-knowledge file links use relative paths: '../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md'. From tasks/8.md, two levels up is work/phase-3-history/ — not the project root. These paths will fail to resolve. Code file links (ChatViewModel.kt, ChatRepository.kt, etc.) use '../../../app/...' — three levels up from tasks/ resolves to work/, not PhoneWrap/. Round 1 finding was not addressed.
findings.fix: Replace all PK file links and code file links with absolute Windows paths, matching the pattern in tasks 5, 7, 9. Example: 'C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md' and 'C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/ui/chat/ChatViewModel.kt'.
